top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Futures Slip, Oil Climbs on Renewed Iran Threat: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stock futures fell and oil climbed as talks between Washington and Tehran were clouded by a renewed threat from President Donald Trump to strike Iran. The pound slipped on speculation around Keir Starmer’s future as UK prime minister.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan to stage five days of combat readiness drills
top_signals.summary: Taipei will base some of its drills on a scenario where China ⁠suddenly turns one of its regular exercises around the island into an actual attack.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Who Runs the Ransomware Group ‘The Gentlemen?’
top_signals.summary: A cybercrime group known as The Gentlemen has emerged as the second most active ransomware gang by victim count, rapidly attracting a talented pool of hackers through an aggressive recruitment strategy that promises affiliates 90 percent of any ransom paid by victims. This post examines clues pointing to a real life identity for the administrator of The Gentlemen ransomware group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russian central bank chief’s absence stirs succession talk - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Russian central bank chief’s absence stirs succession talk  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China wanted western tech. Now, the tables have turned. With John Minnich - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: China wanted western tech. Now, the tables have turned. With John Minnich  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' lassos biggest opening weekend in franchise history with $160 million haul
top_signals.summary: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Secret Network’s Axelar bridge drained for $4.67 million in infinite-mint exploit that went unnoticed for seven days
top_signals.summary: Secret Network says about $770,000 of the stolen funds still sits in the attacker's Axelar wallet, and that Axelar declined its request to freeze it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Andre Cronje, two others resign from Sonic Labs board as S token trades 97% below its peak
top_signals.summary: Sonic Labs said the three "remain invested in Sonic's success" but will no longer make business decisions for the Layer 1 network, formerly Fantom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
